hero.description: Software Developer passionate about building robust and scalable solutions. Specialized in full-stack development with experience in distributed architectures, APIs, and complex systems.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm a Junior Developer with a background in Computer Engineering (Software Development track) from the Valencian Community. I have hands-on experience in application development, legacy service migration, distributed architectures, and real-time systems.
about.p2: My focus is on writing clean, maintainable code that solves real problems. I enjoy learning new technologies and collaborating in multidisciplinary teams.

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.description: I'm always open to collaborations, interesting projects, and new opportunities. Feel free to reach out through any of these channels.
